caption: A woman stands outdoors in front of a brick building with large glass doors and windows. She is wearing a white short-sleeved t-shirt and white pants, with a small blue name tag pinned to her chest. Above her, large silver lettering on the brick wall reads "NDLÆGESKOLE". In the background, signs are posted on the glass doors. The woman faces the camera, maintaining a neutral to smiling expression throughout. In the initial moments, her hands are clasped in front of her waist. As the scene progresses, she begins to speak, slightly opening her mouth and shifting her posture, though she remains in the same position. Her hands stay positioned in front of her as she talks, with subtle movements in her facial expressions and head tilt across the sequence.
